title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!
